questionHtml: Show that the angular speed of the system immediately after the collision is about 5.7 rad s−1.
markschemeHtml:
angular speed of particle = «12/0.6 = » 20 «rad s−1»

OR

angular momentum of particle «0.200 × 12.0 × 0.60» = 1.44 «Js» ✓


«angular momentum of rod-particle system 0.252 ω»

equating ω = «1.440.252» = 5.71 rad s−1 ✓

 

For MP2, working or answer to at least 3 SF should be seen.

meta.title: Show that the angular speed of the system immediately after the collision is about 5.7 rad s−1.
